---
title: "Margin Offset Test"
papersize: us-letter
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        - ['#margin-note\(dy: -2em\)\[']
        - []
      noErrors: default
---

::: {.column-margin dy="-2em"}
Offset margin content.
:::

Main content here.
